name: web_search
description: Performs a web search and returns ranked results including titles, URLs, and snippets. Supports regional filtering, freshness constraints, and domain allowlisting/blocklisting.

query.description: The search query string. Supports natural language and keyword-based searches.
examples: how to treat a sunburn at home
query.$comment: Max 512 chars to align with common search engine query length limits.

num_results.description: Number of search results to return.
num_results.$comment: Capped at 20 to control API cost and response size. Use pagination for more results.

safe_search.description: Whether to enable safe search filtering to exclude explicit or adult content.
safe_search.$comment: Defaults to true for enterprise and general-use safety compliance.

region.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to bias search results towards a specific geographic region.
region.$comment: Uses ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 for standardized region specification. Empty string means global search.

freshness.description: Filter results by how recently they were published or indexed.
freshness.$comment: Enum values map to relative time windows. 'any' disables freshness filtering.

include_domains.description: Optional list of domains to restrict results to. Results from other domains will be excluded.
include_domains.$comment: Domain allowlist for curated information retrieval. Cannot be combined with exclude_domains for same domain.

exclude_domains.description: Optional list of domains to exclude from search results.
exclude_domains.$comment: Domain blocklist to filter low-quality or irrelevant sources from results.
